subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-04-28
subcodes.first_line: If we could appreciate more the bounties of this age, and the marvels of this century, we would be more thankful to God than ever.
subcodes.subjects: @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Baha'u'llah, @thankfulness; gratitude, @critique of Western values; culture, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization
